auth.label: API Key
auth.description: GTmetrix API key used with HTTP Basic authentication. View or regenerate it from your GTmetrix API settings: https://gtmetrix.com/api/

actions.name: get_account_status
actions.description: Get the current GTmetrix account status, credits, and plan capabilities.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for reading GTmetrix account status.

api_refill.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

api_refill_amount.description: The number of API credits restored on the next refill.

account_pro_analysis_options_access.description: Whether the account can use PRO analysis options.

account_pro_locations_access.description: Whether the account can use PRO locations.

account_whitelabel_pdf_access.description: Whether the account can generate white-label PDF reports.

account_pro_team_role.description: The GTmetrix PRO team role returned for the account.

status.description: The GTmetrix account status returned by the status endpoint.

actions.name: get_browser
actions.description: Get a single GTmetrix browser by ID.

actions.name: get_latest_page_report
actions.description: Get the latest GTmetrix report associated with a page.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for the latest page report.

outputSchema.description: The latest GTmetrix page report result.

actions.name: get_location
actions.description: Get a single GTmetrix test location by ID.

actions.name: get_page
actions.description: Get a single GTmetrix page by slug.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for a GTmetrix page.

actions.name: get_report
actions.description: Get a single GTmetrix report by slug.

actions.name: get_simulated_device
actions.description: Get a single GTmetrix simulated device by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for a simulated device.

outputSchema.description: The GTmetrix simulated device lookup result.

actions.name: get_test
actions.description: Get the current state of a GTmetrix test and detect when it has completed.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for a GTmetrix test.

is_complete.description: Whether GTmetrix has completed the test.

report_url.description: The GTmetrix report URL returned when the test has completed.

retry_after_seconds.description: The GTmetrix retry delay returned while the test is pending.

actions.name: list_browsers
actions.description: List GTmetrix browsers that can be used for tests.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing GTmetrix browsers.

browsers.description: The GTmetrix browsers returned by the API.

actions.name: list_locations
actions.description: List GTmetrix test locations available to the connected account.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing GTmetrix locations.

locations.description: The GTmetrix locations returned by the API.

actions.name: list_page_reports
actions.description: List GTmetrix reports associated with a single page.

page_size.description: The number of results to return per page.

page_number.description: The page number of results to return.

items.description: A GTmetrix page reports sort value.

sort.description: The GTmetrix page report sort directives to apply.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing reports for a GTmetrix page.

reports.description: The GTmetrix reports returned by the API.

prev.description: The URL of the previous page, when available.

next.description: The URL of the next page, when available.

self.description: The API URL for this resource.

anyOf.description: Pagination or resource links returned by GTmetrix.

curr_page.description: The current GTmetrix page number returned by the collection endpoint.

credits_left.description: The GTmetrix API credits remaining after a test submission.

credits_used.description: The GTmetrix API credits consumed by a test submission.

actions.name: list_pages
actions.description: List GTmetrix pages associated with the connected account.

page_size.description: The number of results to return per page.

page_number.description: The page number of results to return.

sort.description: The GTmetrix page sort directives to apply.

filter_bool.description: The boolean connector used between GTmetrix filters.

location_ids.description: The GTmetrix location IDs to include in the page list.

browser_ids.description: The GTmetrix browser IDs to include in the page list.

items.description: A GTmetrix monitored filter value accepted by the pages endpoint.

monitored.description: The GTmetrix monitored frequency filters to apply.

urls.description: The GTmetrix page URLs to filter by.

created_eq.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

created_gt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

created_gte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

created_lt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

created_lte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

latest_report_time_eq.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

latest_report_time_gt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

latest_report_time_gte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

latest_report_time_lt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

latest_report_time_lte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing GTmetrix pages.

pages.description: The GTmetrix pages returned by the API.

prev.description: The URL of the previous page, when available.

next.description: The URL of the next page, when available.

self.description: The API URL for this resource.

anyOf.description: Pagination or resource links returned by GTmetrix.

curr_page.description: The current GTmetrix page number returned by the collection endpoint.

credits_left.description: The GTmetrix API credits remaining after a test submission.

credits_used.description: The GTmetrix API credits consumed by a test submission.

actions.name: list_simulated_devices
actions.description: List GTmetrix simulated devices that can be used for tests.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing GTmetrix simulated devices.

simulated_devices.description: The GTmetrix simulated devices returned by the API.

actions.name: list_tests
actions.description: List GTmetrix tests for the connected account.

page_size.description: The number of results to return per page.

page_number.description: The page number of results to return.

sort.description: The GTmetrix test sort directives to apply.

filter_bool.description: The boolean connector used between GTmetrix filters.

items.description: A GTmetrix test source filter value.

sources.description: The GTmetrix test source filters to apply.

items.description: The lifecycle state of the GTmetrix test.

states.description: The GTmetrix test states to include.

location_ids.description: The GTmetrix location IDs to include in the test list.

browser_ids.description: The GTmetrix browser IDs to include in the test list.

created_eq.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

created_gt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

created_gte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

created_lt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

created_lte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

started_eq.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

started_gt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

started_gte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

started_lt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

started_lte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

finished_eq.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

finished_gt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

finished_gte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

finished_lt.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

finished_lte.description: A UNIX timestamp in seconds returned by the GTmetrix API.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing GTmetrix tests.

tests.description: The GTmetrix tests returned by the API.

prev.description: The URL of the previous page, when available.

next.description: The URL of the next page, when available.

self.description: The API URL for this resource.

anyOf.description: Pagination or resource links returned by GTmetrix.

curr_page.description: The current GTmetrix page number returned by the collection endpoint.

credits_left.description: The GTmetrix API credits remaining after a test submission.

credits_used.description: The GTmetrix API credits consumed by a test submission.

actions.name: start_test
actions.description: Start a new GTmetrix performance test for a URL.

url.description: The URL to test with GTmetrix.

report.description: The GTmetrix report type to generate.

retention.description: The number of months GTmetrix should retain the report.

adblock.description: Whether to enable AdBlock during analysis.

cookies.description: The cookies GTmetrix should send with the test request.

video.description: Whether GTmetrix should generate a video.

stop_onload.description: Whether GTmetrix should stop the test at window.onload.

throttle.description: The GTmetrix throttle profile or custom throttle string.

allow_url.description: The GTmetrix allow-list URL patterns to apply.

block_url.description: The GTmetrix block-list URL patterns to apply.

dns.description: The GTmetrix custom DNS mappings to apply.

anonymize_user_agent.description: Whether GTmetrix should strip the trailing GTmetrix user agent tag.

user_agent.description: The custom user agent string to send.

browser_width.description: The browser viewport width in pixels.

browser_height.description: The browser viewport height in pixels.

browser_rotate.description: Whether GTmetrix should swap the browser viewport width and height.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for starting a GTmetrix test.

curr_page.description: The current GTmetrix page number returned by the collection endpoint.

credits_left.description: The GTmetrix API credits remaining after a test submission.

credits_used.description: The GTmetrix API credits consumed by a test submission.

prev.description: The URL of the previous page, when available.

next.description: The URL of the next page, when available.

self.description: The API URL for this resource.

links.description: Pagination or resource links returned by GTmetrix.
